lines.en_lit: Abaye said: knife handles. raises an objection also made bases of vessels, grips of vessels, handles of vessels, and the handles of knives of Yom Kippur of gold. Abaye interpreted handles of axes and hatchets.
Helene, his mother, fashioned a gold chandelier taught When the sun rose, sparks emanate from and everyone knew that the time recite Shema had arrived.

raises an objection: One who recites Shema morning with the men of the priestly watch, or with the men of the non-priestly watch, did not fulfill because the men of the priestly watch early and the men of the non-priestly watch, postpone Abaye said: for the rest of the people in Jerusalem,
also fashioned tablet You learn from this one write a scroll from which a child may be taught. Reish Lakish said in the name of Rabbi Yannai: of alef-beit,
raises an objection When writes he looks and writes that which is written on the tablet. say: He looks and writes like which is written on the tablet.

raises an objection When he writes, he looks and writes that which is written on the tablet. And what is written on the tablet? If a man lay with you…and if he did not lay with you; if you strayed…if you did not stray There,
